title: Fix admin panel product management functionality

requirements.text: Debug and fix the backend product creation API in backend/main.mo to ensure new products are successfully saved when submitted through the admin panel Add Product form - verify the createProduct function properly stores products in the Map storage and returns success confirmation

quotes: products add kr rha hu to add nhi ho rha add krne pr saving likhta but product show nhi ho rha h

acceptanceCriteria: createProduct backend function successfully stores new products with all fields (name, category, price, discount, stock, description, images)
Function returns proper success response when product is created
Products are persisted in backend Map storage and retrievable via getAllProducts query

requirements.text: Debug and fix the backend getAllProducts query function in backend/main.mo to ensure it returns all stored products including demo products - verify the function correctly retrieves products from Map storage and formats them for frontend consumption

quotes: demo products nhi dikh rhei phle se koi product nhi dikh ra bilkul khali h

acceptanceCriteria: getAllProducts query returns complete list of all stored products including demo products
Products are returned with all required fields populated correctly
Query executes without errors and returns data in expected format

requirements.text: Fix the frontend useGetAllProducts React Query hook in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts to properly fetch and display products in the admin Products Management table - ensure error handling displays meaningful messages and loading states work correctly

quotes: Products tab mein demo products bhi nahi dikh rahe

acceptanceCriteria: useGetAllProducts hook successfully fetches products from backend
Products display correctly in ProductsManagement component table
Loading states and error messages are shown appropriately
Products list automatically refreshes after successful product creation

requirements.text: Fix the frontend useCreateProduct mutation hook in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts to properly submit new product data to the backend and handle the response - ensure the mutation invalidates the products query cache to trigger automatic list refresh after successful creation

quotes: Add Product form fill karne ke baad Saving instantly dikhta hai aur form clear ho jata hai lekin naya product Products list mein add nahi hota

acceptanceCriteria: useCreateProduct mutation successfully submits product data to backend createProduct function
Mutation handles success and error responses correctly
Query cache is invalidated after successful creation to refresh products list
Success/error feedback is displayed to user
Form resets only after successful product creation

requirements.text: Verify and fix the ProductFormModal component in frontend/src/components/admin/ProductFormModal.tsx to ensure form submission properly calls the useCreateProduct mutation with all required fields and handles loading/error states correctly

quotes: form submit k baad wo permanently saving pe stuck nhi hota saving turant leta h or form se sare images detailes ht jate h

acceptanceCriteria: ProductFormModal correctly collects all form field values (name, category, price, discount, stock, description, images)
Form submission triggers useCreateProduct mutation with complete product data
Loading state ('Saving...') displays correctly during submission
Form only resets after receiving successful response from backend
Error messages display if submission fails

requirements.text: Add comprehensive error logging to both backend createProduct function and frontend useCreateProduct mutation to capture and display exact error messages when product creation fails - log validation errors, storage errors, and network errors with detailed context

quotes: Console mein 8 issues dikhai de rahe hain

acceptanceCriteria: Backend logs detailed error information when product creation fails
Frontend displays user-friendly error messages from backend responses
Console errors provide clear diagnostic information for debugging
Network request failures are caught and logged with status codes

requirements.text: Test the complete product management workflow end-to-end after fixes: navigate to admin Products tab, verify demo products display in the table, fill out Add Product form with test data, submit the form, verify 'Saving...' indicator appears briefly, confirm new product appears in the products table immediately after submission, and verify the product persists after page refresh

quotes: refresh krne pr bhi product khali rhta h

acceptanceCriteria: Demo products are visible in Products Management table on page load
Add Product form successfully submits and creates new product
New product appears in products table immediately without manual refresh
Products persist in backend storage and remain visible after page refresh
No console errors appear during the entire workflow

constraints: Keep all product storage logic in the main actor using Map data structure
Do not modify authentication or authorization logic
Preserve existing demo product data during fixes
Maintain compatibility with existing ProductCard and ProductsManagement components
nonGoals: Redesigning the admin panel UI layout
Adding new product fields beyond what exists
Implementing product image upload to backend (images remain as URLs)
Implementing product search or advanced filtering in admin panel
